resumeInstruction: Read plan, 10-intent.md, and this checkpoint; verify branch codex/credit-packs before edits.
knownPartialWork: Approved design captured and implementation plan saved.
Task 1 wallet persistence is implemented, specification-compliant, and code-quality approved.
Task 2 public credit catalog and frozen payment confirmation are implemented and approved.
Task 3 wallet-aware availability/debit and exact video refunds are implemented and approved.
Task 4 dry-run-first legacy migration tooling is implemented and approved; no live apply was run.
unsafeToAssume: Do not assume production legacy balances are already migrated or that old pending orders have frozen purchase semantics.
Do not claim real MySQL concurrency verification; local test credentials are rejected.
Do not delete a registered credit catalog version while pending orders may still reference it.
Do not count migrated legacy sources and their new CreditBalance batches simultaneously.
Do not run migration --apply without separate authorization, dry-run evidence, explicit safety limits, and a maintenance plan.
